ops.body: Lane D RESULT (workspace cc-steer-wd, $0 LLM spend). Shipped the degeneracy filter in cc_steer/export.py: DPO_DEGENERACY_FLOOR = 0.005 + WORD_RE (E26's exact d_word metric: r"\w+|[^\w\s]" tokens, rapidfuzz Levenshtein.distance / max(len), empty-vs-empty = 0.0); dpo_degenerate(row) drops a pair when chosen == rejected or d_word < floor; dpo_split filters after dedup. rapidfuzz>=3.9 added to core deps (lock updated). sft/kto untouched. Test test_dpo_split_drops_degenerate_pairs_that_sft_and_kto_keep seeds one healthy + two degenerate pairs (exact-identical and whitespace-only, exercising both clauses); dpo keeps only the healthy pair, sft/kto keep all three. End-to-end recount on cp -c clones of the snapshot dpo view (_base-20260719/dataset/dpo): train drops 7/470 (the probe's exact set: 5 identical + 09264870964c, c972d424d449) -> 463 kept; test drops 1/48 (3723c61f6343) -> 47 kept; total 8, report at /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/laneD-789ac8d9/filter_recount.json. Gates: full pytest 971 passed / 3 skipped (encoder extra absent, expected); Linux ty (docker, --frozen --extra dev --extra gate) "All checks passed!"; docs not needed (great-docs.yml reference lists no export.* surface). Orchestrator ships.
